Bindings.Binding: if App and App.BindCastElement then App.BindCastElement(1) end
if App and App.BindCastElement then App.BindCastElement(2) end
if App and App.BindCastElement then App.BindCastElement(3) end
if App and App.BindCastElement then App.BindCastElement(4) end
if App and App.BindCastSmart then App.BindCastSmart() end
if App and App.BindCastForce then App.BindCastForce() end
